attacking_style: Late-race aggressor who bridges from breakaways inside final kilometer, then relies on strong sprint finish in reduced groups rather than sustained solo efforts.
team_tactics: Limited data on team setup; showed independence in bridging efforts without visible domestique support in attacking phase.
terrain_preference: Selective climbs that thin groups but allow late bridging efforts; strong enough to survive mountain stages while retaining sprint power for reduced finishes.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to identify clear weaknesses; likely vulnerable in pure sprint finishes against specialized sprinters or against pure climbers on sustained gradients.
key_patterns: Attacks inside final 1km after bridging from break, not early aggression.
Combines climbing durability with sprint finish for tactical advantage in reduced groups.
Shows tactical maturity in timing: waits to spring rather than burning matches early.
form_trajectory: unknown: only single 2017 observation available showing strong form with stage win, but insufficient recent data
